question: How many orders do we have for "Pride and Prejudice"?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Books_Order.IdOrder) FROM Books_Order JOIN Book ON Books_Order.ISBN = Book.ISBN WHERE Book.Title = 'Pride and Prejudice'

semantic.reason: 缺少连接条件导致无法正确关联Book表和Books_Order表，过滤条件应基于订单与书籍的关联字段（如Books_Order.BookId = Book.Id）
